title: Department of Coaching Education - Student Opinions
content:
Department of Coaching Education - Student Opinions

"In the field of sports, our university professors teach us in detail how to work more technically and how to act and behave in the areas we choose. We learned how to act as a coach and how to intervene when there are sports injuries or injuries."

Ferhat DEMIRKIRAN

1st Year Student of Department of Coaching Education

"To us students who receive coaching training at Istanbul Esenyurt University; What we should pay attention to in creating a healthy, fun, positive and professional sports life was conveyed. We, the coach candidates, are taught with scientific methods what needs to be done in order to bring the athletes to the professional level without injury in accordance with the age group."

Omer SAGIR

2nd Year Student of the Department of Coaching Education

"At Istanbul Esenyurt University, subjects such as how to coach on training information, the basic stages of training, and training practices for children are taught. The training we received for our personal development in these areas provided a lot of benefits. We were given the opportunity to produce creative ideas while applying what we learned in the field in the development of our coaching skills. It was instructive to convey what we need to be careful about the approach of a coach to his athlete."

4th Year Student of the Department of Coaching Education

This content was updated on 29/01/2026.
